title: Knight
imageGenerationPromptFullBody: A noble knight wearing polished full plate steel armor with a heraldic surcoat, short cropped hair, strong jawline, serious and determined expression, great sword at his side

title: King
imageGenerationPromptFullBody: A regal king wearing a floor-length ermine-trimmed royal robe over a gold brocade tunic, silver-streaked short hair, neatly trimmed beard, commanding and stern expression, holding an ornate jeweled scepter

title: Queen
imageGenerationPromptFullBody: A graceful queen wearing an elegant deep crimson and gold brocade gown with wide sleeves and a fitted bodice, long wavy dark hair pinned with pearl pins, jeweled crown, composed and dignified expression

title: Wizard
imageGenerationPromptFullBody: An ancient wizard wearing long deep-purple robes embroidered with silver mystical runes, tall pointed hat, waist-length white beard, long flowing white hair, sharp piercing eyes, wise and mysterious expression, holding a gnarled glowing staff

title: Archer
imageGenerationPromptFullBody: A skilled archer wearing fitted dark green leather jerkin over chainmail, hood down revealing short tousled brown hair, sharp focused eyes, calm and alert expression, longbow drawn with an arrow nocked

title: Blacksmith
imageGenerationPromptFullBody: A burly blacksmith wearing a heavy leather apron over a coarse linen shirt with rolled-up sleeves, short dark hair damp with sweat, thick stubble, intense and hardworking expression, holding a hammer

title: Princess
imageGenerationPromptFullBody: A young princess wearing a flowing pastel blue gown with gold embroidery and long trailing sleeves, long silky blonde hair adorned with small flowers, delicate silver tiara, soft and gentle smile, warm and kind expression

title: Jester
imageGenerationPromptFullBody: A court jester wearing a motley suit of red, yellow, and green patches with jingling bells on a multi-pointed hat, curly copper hair peeking out, rosy cheeks, wide mischievous grin, lively and playful expression

title: Monk
imageGenerationPromptFullBody: A devoted monk wearing a coarse brown woolen hooded robe tied with a rope belt, tonsured hair with a shaved crown, gentle and serene expression, kind eyes, holding a leather-bound illuminated manuscript

title: Assassin
imageGenerationPromptFullBody: A hooded assassin wearing dark fitted leather armor with layered pauldrons and bracers, face half-veiled in black cloth revealing sharp cold eyes, straight dark hair falling across the forehead, expressionless and calculating, twin daggers at the belt

title: Paladin
imageGenerationPromptFullBody: A holy paladin wearing gleaming golden plate armor engraved with divine sun symbols, short golden hair, clean-shaven, noble and resolute expression with a warm inner glow, white flowing cape, holding a radiant blessed sword and shield

title: Witch
imageGenerationPromptFullBody: A mysterious witch wearing a tattered layered dark robe with wide sleeves, wide-brimmed black hat, long wild silver-streaked black hair, sharp angular features, cunning and knowing smile, holding a glowing green potion bottle

title: Dragon Rider
imageGenerationPromptFullBody: A fearless dragon rider wearing scaled dark leather armor with iron rivets and a crested helmet pushed back, long wind-swept auburn hair, fierce amber eyes, bold and fearless expression, wind-swept dark cape

title: Bard
imageGenerationPromptFullBody: A charming bard wearing a vibrant blue and gold doublet with puffy sleeves, feathered cap tilted jauntily, wavy chestnut hair to the shoulders, bright eyes, warm charismatic smile, playing a lute

title: Merchant
imageGenerationPromptFullBody: A portly merchant wearing a fine wool traveling coat with fur trim and brass buttons over a embroidered waistcoat, thinning gray hair slicked back, well-groomed mustache, shrewd and calculating expression, holding a leather coin purse
